message.accountDeployedMessage: Your smart account may not have the same address on other chains. Please double-check before proceeding.
message.autoRefuel: You're low on {{chainName}} gas. By continuing, you'll get enough gas to complete the transaction.
message.emptyBridgesList: We couldn't find any bridges that match your search
message.emptyChainList: We couldn't find any chains that match your search
message.emptyExchangesList: We couldn't find any exchanges that match your search
message.emptyTokenListAllNetworks: We couldn't find any tokens. Please search by contract address if your token doesn't appear, or try selecting a different chain.
message.emptyTransactionHistory: Your transactions will appear here once you complete your first transfer.
message.routeNotFound: Reasons for that could be: low liquidity, amount selected is too low, gas costs are too high or there are no routes for the selected combination.

message.exchangePartiallySuccessful: We've tried to complete the transaction, but {{tool}} couldn't proceed due to either slippage settings or lack of liquidity for the {{tokenSymbol}} token.

message.accountNotDeployedMessage: Smart contract account doesn't exist on the destination chain. Sending funds to a non-existent smart contract account can result in permanent loss.
message.lowAddressActivity: This address has low activity on {{chainName}} network. Please verify you're sending to the correct address and network to prevent potential loss of funds.
message.clearFailedTransactions: Failed transactions are only stored locally and can't be recovered once cleared.
message.fundsLossPrevention: Always ensure smart contract accounts are properly set up on the destination chain and avoid direct transfers to exchanges to prevent fund loss.
message.highValueLoss: The value of the received tokens is significantly lower than the exchanged tokens and transaction cost.
message.unverifiedToken: Unverified token. Always do your own research before proceeding.
message.insufficientFunds: You don't have enough funds to complete the transaction.
message.insufficientGas: You don't have enough gas to complete the transaction. You need to add at least:
message.minFromAmountUSD: Minimum amount is {{amount, currencyExt(currency: USD)}}. Please enter a higher amount.
message.rateChanged: The exchange rate has changed. By continuing the transaction, you'll accept the new rate.
message.resetSettings: This will reset your route priority, slippage, gas price, enabled bridges and exchanges.
message.slippageOutsideRecommendedLimits: High slippage tolerance may result in unfavorable trade caused by front-running.
message.slippageUnderRecommendedLimits: Low slippage tolerance may cause transaction delays or failures.

checkbox.highValueLoss: I accept the high value loss

message.allowanceRequired: Transfer amount for {{tokenSymbol}} exceeds your current allowance. Please increase your allowance and try again.
message.insufficientFunds: You don't have enough gas to cover the cost of the transaction.
message.rateLimitExceeded: Too many requests have been made in a short period of time. Please wait a moment and try again or contact support if the issue persists.
message.remainInYourWallet: {{amount, numberExt}} {{tokenSymbol}} on {{chainName}} remain in your wallet.
message.signatureRejected: Your signature is required to complete the transaction. {{amount, numberExt}} {{tokenSymbol}} on {{chainName}} remain in your wallet.
message.slippageThreshold: The slippage is larger than the defined threshold. Please request a new quote.
message.thirdPartyError: We couldn't complete your request due to a problem with an external service. Please try again or contact support if the issue persists.
message.transactionConflict: Transaction couldn't be processed because it's conflicting with another pending transaction using the same funds. Please wait for the pending transaction to be confirmed or check your transaction history before trying again.
message.transactionExpired: The block height has exceeded the maximum allowed limit or blockhash is no longer recent enough.
message.transactionRejected: The transaction was rejected due to an internal wallet error. Please try again or request a new quote.
message.transactionFailed: Please check the block explorer for more information.
message.transactionSimulationFailed: The transaction could not be executed in simulation.
message.unknown: Please try again or contact support.
message.walletChangedDuringExecution: The wallet address that requested the quote does not match the wallet address attempting to sign the transaction. Please ensure the same wallet address is used throughout the entire transaction execution.

title.gasLimitIsTooLow: The gas limit is too low
title.walletAddressInvalid: Wallet address or domain name is invalid
title.walletAddressInvalid_chain: Wallet address or domain name is invalid for selected destination chain {{chainName}}
title.walletChainTypeInvalid: Wallet address doesn't match the selected destination chain {{chainName}}

tooltip.estimatedTime: Time to complete the swap or bridge transaction, excluding chain switching and token approval.
tooltip.exchangeRate: The estimated conversion rate between source and destination tokens. Click to toggle the direction.
tooltip.feeCollection: The fee is applied to selected token pairs and ensures we can provide the best experience.
tooltip.minReceived: The estimated minimum amount may change until the swapping/bridging transaction is signed. For 2-step transfers, this applies until the second step transaction is signed.
tooltip.multistep: This route requires multiple transactions to complete the transfer. Each exchange step can contain 1-2 transactions that require a signature.
tooltip.gasless: We handle the gas, so you can transfer assets without holding native tokens. Network costs are included in the transfer.
tooltip.priceImpact: The estimated value difference between the source and destination tokens.
tooltip.progressToNextUpdate: Quotes will update in {{value}} seconds. <0/> Click here to update now.
tooltip.slippage: The maximum percentage difference between the expected price, and the actual price at which a transfer is executed. This value can be changed in settings.

settings.resetSettings: You're using custom settings that can affect the number or sorting of available routes.

sendToWallet.noBookmarkedWalletsMessage: Save your frequently used wallet addresses for quick access.
sendToWallet.noConnectedWalletsMessage: Connect a wallet to see it listed here.
sendToWallet.noRecentWalletsMessage: Your recently used wallet addresses will appear here.

closeConfirmation.title: Leave checkout?
closeConfirmation.body: Closing won't cancel your deposit. You can come back to check on it here anytime.

abandonConfirmation.title: Cancel this transfer?
abandonConfirmation.body: Your deposit details will be discarded. Don't send funds to this address after cancelling.

legal.termsDisclaimer: By continuing, you agree to LI.FI's <terms>Terms of Service</terms>.

resume.notFoundToast: We couldn't find your transaction. Start over or contact support if you think this is a mistake.

transferDeposit.warning: Send at least {{amount}} {{symbol}} on {{chain}}. Wrong token or chain may be unrecoverable.
transferDeposit.expired: This deposit window expired. Generate a new one to continue.

unexpected.title: Unexpected deposit
unexpected.description: We received a deposit that doesn't match a supported route. Contact support for next steps.

amountLowThreshold.title: Deposit incomplete
amountLowThreshold.description: Top up to complete your order, or to enable a refund.

amountLowTopUp.title: Deposit incomplete
amountLowTopUp.description: Send the remaining before the deposit window closes.

amountLowExpired.title: Deposit incomplete
amountLowExpired.description: The deposit window has expired. You can request a refund for the amount received.

excessHeld.title: Excess held
excessHeld.description: Your order is processing. The excess is held — request a refund to retrieve it.

lateArrival.title: Deposit arrived late
lateArrival.description: Your funds reached us after the deposit window closed. You can reactivate to continue, or request a refund.

addressExpired.title: Deposit address expired
addressExpired.description: The deposit address has expired without receiving funds. You can try again with a new deposit address.

marketMoved.title: Transaction failed
marketMoved.description: The exchange rate moved before your order could complete. Your funds are safe — a refund has been started.

refunding.title: Transaction failed — refunding
refunding.description: We couldn't complete the transfer after several attempts. Your funds are being refunded to the wallet that sent them.

cashCurrency.error: Unable to load currencies right now. Try again.

cashQuote.refundNote: You'll receive at least {{value}}, or a full refund.
cashQuote.error: Unable to refresh the quote right now. Try again.

cashHandoff.title: You'll finish paying in Transak
cashHandoff.body: Your payment passes through a temporary deposit address we created for this purchase, not your personal wallet. That's expected, and it happens automatically.
cashHandoff.addressHint: You'll see this same address in Transak.

checkout.addWalletToReceive: Add a wallet to receive your {{token}}
checkout.insufficientFunds: Insufficient funds — You don't have enough {{symbol}} on {{chain}}. Select a different token to try again.

routeNotFound.title: Can't buy this token here
routeNotFound.description: This token isn't available through the payment method you selected. Try a different token, or pay from a connected wallet.

progress.title: Purchase in progress
progress.description: We're processing your purchase. This may take a few minutes.

errors.MISSING_API_URL: {{providerName}} is not configured: set sdkConfig.apiUrl on the checkout.
errors.MISSING_API_KEY: {{providerName}} is not configured: set widget apiKey to call checkout sessions.
errors.TARGET_NOT_CONFIGURED: {{providerName}} destination is not configured: set widget.toChain and widget.toToken.
errors.SESSION_HTTP: Could not start {{providerName}} session ({{status}}). Try again later.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Try again later.

failure.connectionDescription: We couldn't connect to {{providerName}}. Try again or contact support.
failure.withdrawalDescription: {{providerName}} couldn't process your withdrawal. Your funds remain in your account.
failure.transferDescription: We couldn't complete the transfer after several attempts. Your funds are being refunded to the wallet that sent them.

successCompleted.title: Transaction successful
successCompleted.description: Your transaction has been completed successfully.

successPartial.title: Partially completed
successPartial.description: Your transaction completed, but some of the received tokens are not the requested destination tokens. Open the details to see what you received.

successRefund.title: Refund complete
successRefund.description: Your transaction could not be completed and your funds have been refunded.

pendingDefault.title: Processing transaction
pendingDefault.description: Your transaction is being processed. This may take a few minutes.

pendingRefund.title: Refund in progress
pendingRefund.description: We're sending your funds back. This usually takes a few minutes.

pendingRetrying.title: Retrying transaction
pendingRetrying.description: We encountered an issue and are automatically retrying your transaction.

errorExpired.title: Transaction expired
errorExpired.description: The transaction window has expired. Please try again.

errorFailed.title: Transaction failed
errorFailed.description: We couldn't complete your transaction. Try again or contact support.

errorConnection.title: Connection failed
errorConnection.description: We couldn't connect to the payment provider. Try again or contact support.

exchange.title: Exchange connection failed
exchange.description: We couldn't connect to your exchange account. Try again or contact support.

errorWithdrawal.title: Withdrawal failed
errorWithdrawal.description: The payment provider couldn't process your withdrawal. Your funds remain in your account.

cash.title: Payment didn't complete
cash.description: Your payment didn't go through. No funds were taken.

exchange.title: Exchange withdrawal failed
exchange.description: Your exchange couldn't process the withdrawal. Your funds remain in your exchange account.

errorCancelled.title: Transaction cancelled
errorCancelled.description: Your transaction was cancelled. You can try again whenever you're ready.

cash.title: Payment cancelled
cash.description: You closed the payment window. Your order wasn't placed.

errorUnavailable.title: Service unavailable
errorUnavailable.description: The payment provider is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later or contact support.

cash.title: Card payment unavailable
cash.description: Card payments are temporarily unavailable. Try again later or use a different method.

walletDisconnected.title: Wallet disconnected
walletDisconnected.description: Your wallet was disconnected during the transaction. Reconnect and try again.

walletErrorFailed.title: Transaction failed
walletErrorFailed.description: We couldn't complete your transaction. View the details or try again.

walletErrorExpired.title: Order expired
walletErrorExpired.description: The transaction window expired before your order could be processed. Please try again.

walletPendingRefund.title: Refund in progress
walletPendingRefund.description: We're sending your funds back to the wallet you paid from. This usually takes a few minutes.

walletSuccessRefund.title: Refund complete
walletSuccessRefund.description: Your transaction could not be completed and your funds have been refunded to your wallet.

refund.title: Refund
refund.inProgressDescription: Your {{amount}} {{symbol}} on {{chain}} is being returned to your wallet. This usually takes a few minutes.
refund.completeDescription: Your {{amount}} {{symbol}} on {{chain}} was returned to your wallet.
